violations.text: Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and back storage room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Mop bucket was emptied, and mop was stored to air dry at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floors under the shelves in the storefront have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025
